UMAP with Pie Charts at Cluster Centroids

PlotPieUMAP.Rd

Overlays proportional pie charts on a UMAP (or any 2D reduction) — one pie per level of group.by — where each slice shows the fraction of cells from each level of split.by (e.g. sample composition per cluster).

Uses ggforce::geom_arc_bar for stable pie rendering that works correctly with ggplot2 >= 3.4 (unlike the old coord_polar approach).

Usage

PlotPieUMAP(
  seurat_object,
  group.by,
  split.by,
  reduction = "umap",
  pie_scale = 1,
  bg_color = "lightgrey",
  bg_alpha = 0.3,
  pt.size = 0.4,
  split_colors = NULL,
  label = TRUE,
  label_size = 3,
  output_dir = NULL,
  object_name = "",
  subset_name = ""
)

Arguments

seurat_object

A Seurat object.

group.by

Metadata column defining the groups/clusters. One pie chart is placed at each group's centroid in the reduction space.

split.by

Metadata column whose level proportions define the pie slices (e.g. "Sample" shows how much of each cluster is each sample).

reduction

Dimensionality reduction to use. Default "umap".

pie_scale

Scaling multiplier for pie radius (1 = auto-sized). Increase for larger pies, decrease if pies overlap. Default 1.

bg_color

Background scatter point colour. Default "lightgrey".

bg_alpha

Background scatter point transparency. Default 0.3.

pt.size

Background scatter point size. Default 0.4.

split_colors

Named character vector of colours for split.by levels. Auto-assigned from PrepObject or Nour_pal if NULL.

label

Logical. Add cluster labels at centroids. Default TRUE.

label_size

Font size for cluster labels. Default 3.

output_dir

Directory to save a PDF. NULL = no save.

object_name

Label prefix for output file names.

subset_name

Optional subset label.

Value

A ggplot2 object.
